chapter_title.en: The Ritual Bath of jumu’ah, Entering the Bathhouse, Its Etiquette, and Teachings on Cleanliness and Beautification

text: 253 - وَقَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: «اَلْفَخِذُ لَيْسَ مِنَ اَلْعَوْرَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.253 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
'The thigh is not considered part of the 'awrah (private parts).'
